modeDecision: Existing website shows strong redesign opportunity.

outreach.diagnosis: Zero Fox already has a website, but it likely undersells the real business. The redesign opportunity is to improve clarity, trust, and the path from interest to booking or enquiry.
outreach.coldMessageAngle: I took a look at the current site and mocked up a version that makes the offer clearer and the next step easier for mobile visitors.

notes: Discovery offer angle: I noticed your site has a fixable trust gap: No contact/enquiry/quote page candidate was captured from visible links.
